title: Unique Outdoor Sofa Color Fabric Sits Amidst
sourceTitle: Unique Outdoor Sofa Color Fabric Sits Amidst
prompt: a unique outdoor sofa in [COLOR] fabric, sits amidst a field of blooming wildflowers. the sofa features soft, light colored cushioning and several [COLOR]-toned pillows. the flowers carpeting the ground are predominantly [COLOR] shades wildflowers, scattered across rolling green hills. in the far background, a tranquil body of water is visible under a sky that transitions from pale pink to light blue, suggesting either dawn or dusk. --ar 9:16 --raw --profile 6za18wv --stylize 50 --v 8.1
